rulings.Case Title: THE PATEL FAMILY REVOCABLE TRUST BY AND THROUGH VS. VINODKUMAR R PATEL

PLAINTIFF THE PATEL FAMILY REVOCABLE TRUST'S Motion For An Order Appointing A Receiver For Real Property At 2524 And 2532 Lombard Street DENIED. rulings.Case Title: PYRAMID DESIGN(SERIES D) LLC ET AL VS. GERALD R. LOWE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 27, 2015, line 10. Plaitniffs' Demurrer To Cross-Complaint sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer based on CCP 430.10(d) and (f) with leave to amend for Cross-Complainant to clarify which causes of action are alleged by cross-complainants in their individual capacities against cross-defendant in his individual capacity. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. All causes of action are sufficiently alleged. = (501/req)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 27, 2015, line 4. DEFENDANT WAI SUM'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR. = (501/req)

rulings.Case Title: YOU LIANG SONG VS. WAI SUN SUM ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 27, 2015, line 4. DEFENDANT WAI SUM'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND to allege a cause of action against the defendant. Plaintiff should also indicate why venue is proper in this county based on whatever causes of action Plaintiff alleges. = (501/req)
